name: Flower Kids' Floor Cushion Throw Pillow - Pillowfort™
description: Add a touch of sweet charm and soft comfort to your kid's room with this Flower Throw Pillow Floor Cushion from Pillowfort™. This floor cushion features a velvet exterior with soft polyurethane foam filling for padded comfort that’s perfect for sitting and relaxing. Showcasing a floral silhouette with piped edges, the floor cushion also has a colorful floral pattern with a button accent in the middle for a charming touch.
